## Job description
...
About the Role 
We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Technical Manager to join our dynamic and growing team. This role is a perfect blend of hands-on engineering and strategic leadership. The successful candidate will be responsible for architecting and implementing our DevOps strategy on the Azure platform, guiding a team of talented engineers, and ensuring the continuous delivery of high-quality software and infrastructure.
...
* Technical Leadership & Mentorship: Lead, mentor, and coach a team of DevOps engineers, fostering a culture of ownership, accountability, and continuous improvement. Provide technical guidance and strategic direction for all DevOps initiatives.
...
* Architecting & Implementation: Design, build, and maintain robust and scalable CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions, or other relevant tools to automate software builds, testing, and deployments.
...
* Infrastructure as Code (IaC): Drive the adoption and implementation of Infrastructure as Code using Terraform, Azure Resource Manager (ARM) templates to provision and manage Azure resources.
...
* DevSecOps: Implement and enforce security best practices within the CI/CD pipelines and cloud infrastructure, integrating automated security testing, vulnerability scanning, and compliance checks.
...
software development lifecycle.
...
* Automation: Develop and maintain automation scripts (e.g., PowerShell, Python, Bash) to streamline routine tasks, enhance pipeline efficiency, and reduce manual intervention.
...
* Problem-Solving: Act as a subject matter expert, providing advanced
...
related to infrastructure
...
and CI/CD pipelines.
...
* Experience: 
* 7+ years of professional experience in a DevOps, SRE, or similar role.
...
* Azure Expertise:
...
* In-depth, hands-on experience with a wide range of Azure services, including Azure Virtual Machines, Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS), Azure App Services, Azure Functions, and Azure SQL/Cosmos DB, API management, Azure AI Foundry, Relay, network rules, Storage account .
...
* Proven experience with Infrastructure as Code (IaC) tools, specifically Terraform and/or ARM.
...
* CI/CD: Extensive knowledge and practical experience with CI/CD concepts and tools, with a strong preference for expertise in Azure DevOps Pipelines and/or GitHub Actions.
...
* Containerization: Hands-on experience with Docker and container orchestration platforms like Kubernetes (AKS).
...
* Scripting: Strong proficiency in at least one scripting language (e.g., PowerShell, Python, Bash).
...
* Version Control: Expert-level knowledge of Git and repository management.
...
* Education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.
...
* Certifications: Microsoft Certified: Azure DevOps Engineer Expert (AZ-400), or other relevant Azure certifications.
* Configuration Management: Experience with configuration management tools such as Ansible, Chef, or Puppet.
* Monitoring: Experience with advanced monitoring and observability tools like Prometheus, Grafana, Datadog, or New Relic.
* Other Clouds: Familiarity with other cloud platforms (AWS, GCP).
* Experience with a specific programming language, such as C#/.NET, Java, or Python.

## Avery Dennison Hiring for Chemical Engineering Job | Executive Role
...
Looking for a rewarding Chemical Engineering Job with a global innovation leader? Avery Dennison Careers has announced an outstanding Executive Job opportunity in Pune for professionals eager to work on advanced materials, product development, and sustainable technologies. This role offers exposure to international projects, cross-functional collaboration, and cutting-edge manufacturing solutions. Candidates seeking growth, innovation, and impactful work should not miss this exciting career opportunity.
...
- Job Position: Senior Executive – R&D
- Location: Pune Division, Maharashtra
...
Avery Dennison Careers offer professionals the chance to work with one of the world’s leading materials science companies. Operating across more than 50 countries, the organization develops innovative labeling, packaging, RFID, and digital identification solutions. This Chemical Engineering Job supports initiatives that improve sustainability, transparency, and supply chain efficiency. Employees benefit from a collaborative environment, global exposure, and opportunities to contribute to technologies that shape modern industries.
...
Job Overview:
...
This Chemical Engineering Job is for the position of Senior Executive – R&D based in Pune, Maharashtra. Through Avery Dennison Careers, the selected candidate will participate in raw material development, product commercialization, customer-focused innovation, and project management activities. The Executive Job requires close coordination
...
with operations, sales, marketing, and technical teams to ensure successful product launches and continuous improvements. Professionals with expertise in chemical or polymer engineering and experience in packaging or adhesive technologies will find significant growth opportunities in this role.
...
- Manage the processes used for development including VoC/CTQs; New Raw Material & Laminate Specs & Tracking Development projects.

...
- Graduate/Master’s in Engineering-Chemical/Polymer science
- Required 2-3 years of related Technical experience.
- Minimum 2 years of working experiences in packaging film / paper manufacturing; adhesive compounding or related industries.
...
- Experience with product development and product commercialization processes.
...
- Strong Project Management skills – Drive; document and execute strategies when leading projects to meet the business needs and timeframes.
...
- Excellent problem solving analysis and analytical skills.
...
- Customer focus with strong customer relationship-building experience.
...
- Lead project teams and facilitate / encourage strong multifunctional team work.
...

...
- Fluent in both spoken and written English.
- Strong Technical report writing & Presentation skills.
- Minitab & Statistical knowledge.
- Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
...
- Strong command of common computer software programs (i.e. MS Office; Minitab; Google Drive etc.).
...
- Knowledge in narrow web printing technologies such as UV Flexo; Digital; Gravure; Offset and letterpress.
...
- Knowledge in understanding adhesive formulations/ Top coat formulation and chemistry of the same.
...
- A previous working experience in a MNC is preferred.
...
This Chemical Engineering Job offers a remarkable opportunity for ambitious professionals to build a successful career through Avery Dennison Careers. The Executive Job combines research, innovation, product development, and sustainability within a global organization. Candidates passionate about advanced materials and industrial innovation will gain valuable international exposure, professional growth, and the chance to contribute to industry-leading technologies that positively impact businesses and consumers worldwide.

Manager Intelligent Labels

# Sales Manager Intelligent Labels
...
Posted Jun 30, 2026
...
### Job Description:
...
We are looking for a motivated and highly driven new member to join our fast paced, growing team in the Avery Dennison Intelligent labels Sales Team to boost RFID adoption across industries. Are you ready for this meaningful role in a very fast, highly competitive growing business and within a high performing sales team?
...
In this position you work independently and either work from home or travel to existing and new customers in your region. The primary territory of your focus is East Europe: Poland, Czech Republic, Slovakia, Romania, Hungary and Bulgaria.
...
How your role would look like:
...
- Growing our existing customers in East Europe
...
- Growing and developing sales by winning new customers in your territory
...
- Results oriented selling across the Avery Dennison RFID product portfolio, including technical knowledge of RFID transponders and how and where to use them
...
prospects but also previous customers
...
- Responsible for achieving sales and margin targets within EMEA and new customer wins
...
Developing a sound understanding
...
the competitive landscape assessing continuously
...
trends and opportunities
...
- Using SalesForce and other tools to effectively analyze your sales activities and customer base as well as creating regular sales forecasts and performing an efficient pipeline management
...
### Qualifications:
...
What we expect
...
- You have 5+ years experience in B2B sales, ideally in an international business in the RFID industry or technically exigent products
...
### Why join Avery Dennison
...
We are a global materials science and digital identification solutions company with locations in over 50 countries, and approximately 35,000 employees worldwide. As a science and innovation company, we believe that diverse teams are stronger teams. We are committed to fostering a culture of curiosity and courage, where you can grow your career with a company that has innovation in its DNA. Founded on creating real-world impact to enable a better future, we strive to provide an open, collaborative culture where diversity of thought is encouraged and respected. Hear from our employees about what it's like working at Avery Dennison. Learn more at www.averydennison.com.
...
At Avery Dennison, we work with the biggest brands in FMCG, Apparel, Automotive and Pharma industry. Our European Headquarters in the Netherlands, founded in 1955 and since 2014 located in the Leiden Bioscience Park, is a collaborative and dynamic environment that supports all Avery Dennison businesses and employs approximately 500 talented individuals. The location serves as the central hub for European Leadership and other functions that support the wider European manufacturing and distribution network. The location features a state-of-the-art Research and Development Center.

results.title: Business Process & Master Data Owner (BPO) | Hirequorum
highlights:
# Business Process & Master Data Owner (BPO)
...
Avery Dennison Corporation (NYSE: AVY) is a global materials science and digital identification solutions company. We are Making Possible™ products and solutions that help advance the industries we serve, providing branding and information solutions that optimize labor and supply chain efficiency, reduce waste and mitigate loss, advance sustainability, circularity and transparency and better connect brands and consumers. We design and develop labeling and functional materials, radio-frequency identification (RFID) inlays and tags, software applications that connect the physical and digital and offerings that enhance branded packaging and carry or display information that improves the customer experience. Serving industries worldwide — including home and personal care, apparel, general retail, e-commerce, logistics, food and grocery, pharmaceuticals and automotive — we employ approximately 35,000 employees in nearly 60 countries. Our reported sales in 2025 were $8.9 billion. Learn more at www.averydennison.com.
...
### Job Description:
...
The Business Process & Master Data Owner (BPO) is responsible for the overall management, quality, and governance of master data objects, including customers, suppliers, products, and other critical data domains. This role involves implementing policies, standards, and requirements for master data while ensuring compliance and data quality across the organization. The BPO collaborates with cross-functional teams to align data management with business objectives.
...
- Data Governance
...
- Implement data governance policies, standards, and requirements for master data domains as laid out by MDM Manager (Sreeni).

- Identify new data requirements for new business areas (Application, Sublimation,VTF etc)
...
- Ensure compliance with established data governance standards across all relevant business processes.
...
- Data Quality
...
- Accountable for maintaining and improving the quality and integrity of master data within the project parameters.

- Conduct regular and consistent data quality reviews for the site and lead initiatives to address discrepancies and inconsistencies.
...
- Approve major changes to data policies, standards, and master data definitions.
...
- Evaluate and authorize data-related decisions and escalations.
...
- Collaborate with business and IT stakeholders to align data usage with organizational objectives.

- Provide guidance on data requirements for new business initiatives and system implementations.

- Oversee how data is used and ensure its alignment with operational and strategic goals.
...
- Data Standards and Compliance:
...
- Ensure the project adheres to master data standards to ensure consistency and usability across the organization.

- Ensure the project adheres to procedures for master data maintenance, including creation, updates, and retirement.
...
### Key Activities
...
### Implement Avery Dennison data governance policies and standards.
...
Ensure data quality and integrity through reviews and audits.
...
### Qualifications:
...
Skills and Qualifications
...
- Education: Bachelor’s degree in Business, Information Systems, Data Management, or a related field.

- Experience:

- 5+ years of experience in master data management, data governance, or related fields.

- Proven experience in defining and implementing data standards and policies.

- Experience working in cross-functional teams and large-scale enterprise systems.
...
- Technical Knowledge:

- Familiarity with master data management (MDM) tools and ERP systems.

- Strong understanding of data governance frameworks and principles.

- Oracle cloud based systems such as Fusion, CPQ and CDM would be a distinct advantage
...
- Soft Skills:
...
- Excellent communication and leadership skills.

- Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities.

- Ability to influence and align stakeholders across the organization.
...
925
...
95,000 year.

## What is the average salary of Avery Dennison Research Scientist?
...
Avery Dennison Research Scientists earn $71,000 annually, or $34 per hour, which is 9% higher than the national average for all Research Scientists at $65,000 annually and 7% higher than the national salary average for ​all working Americans. The highest paid Research Scientists work for Sprint at $122,000 annually and the lowest paid Research Scientists work for CSIR, Water Research Institute at $21,000 annually.

# Experienced Data Scientist – AI/Machine Learning Developer – Generative AI Platform Development
...
Join arenaflex, and you'll be part of a team that's changing the world one innovation at a time. We are currently seeking a talented and passionate Data Scientist to join our Cloud Technologies Application Platform team and help us build the future of developer experience through cutting-edge artificial intelligence solutions.
...
Are you ready to take your career to the next level with a company that values innovation and excellence? arenaflex is looking for an experienced Data Scientist to join our dynamic team as an AI/Machine Learning Developer. In this role, you will be instrumental in designing and executing our artificial intelligence strategy to elevate our developer experience platform to unprecedented heights.
...
This is a unique opportunity to work at the forefront of generative AI technology, collaborating with multidisciplinary teams to develop innovative solutions that will transform how developers create applications at arenaflex. You'll leverage your expertise in machine learning, deep learning, and large language models to solve complex business challenges and drive measurable impact across the organization.
...
As a Data Scientist at arenaflex, you will be responsible for driving our AI initiatives and contributing to the development of next-generation developer tools. Your key responsibilities will include:
...
Design, develop, and implement machine learning models and algorithms that enhance our developer experience platform, ensuring alignment with arenaflex's overall technology strategy.
...
Build, train, and fine-tune machine learning models, including foundation models and large language models, to address various business problems and improve developer productivity.
...
Choose appropriate machine learning algorithms, train models, and calibrate hyperparameters to achieve optimal predictive performance and model accuracy.
...
Apply deep expertise in transformer architecture, vector embeddings, and advanced ML techniques to develop solutions that solve complex business challenges.
...
Lead model deployment for experimentation, implementing A/B testing, monitoring model performance, and iterating on solutions based on empirical results.
...
Work closely with AI engineers, software developers, product managers, and other data scientists to deliver end-to-end AI-enabled solutions.
...
Experience with training models or utilizing foundation models and fine-tuning them to meet custom business requirements.
...
. A Master's degree is strongly preferred and will be given special consideration.
...
Minimum of 5+ years of progressive experience in the software industry with a focused specialization in machine learning and artificial intelligence.
...
Strong understanding and extensive experience with cutting-edge machine learning algorithms, deep learning architectures, statistical modeling, and large language models.
...
- Advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in Data Science, Computer Science, or related field

- Experience applying machine learning techniques specifically in developer productivity or software development lifecycle contexts

- Knowledge of cloud platforms and infrastructure (AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud)

- Familiarity with MLOps practices and deployment pipelines

- Published research or contributions to open-source machine learning projects

- Experience with prompt engineering and LLM optimization techniques
...
If you are passionate about artificial intelligence, machine learning, and want to work on projects that will shape the future of technology, arenaflex is the place for you. We are looking for individuals who bring enthusiasm, dedication, and fresh perspectives to their work – people who are ready to push boundaries and achieve extraordinary results.

highlights:
# Senior, Data Scientist
...
Sunnyvale, CAHybridSeniorML / AI
...
Senior ML engineer on Walmart's Catalog Data Science team building production GenAI and deep learning models for product attribute extraction, classification, and catalog optimization at petabyte scale.
...
About Team The Catalog Data Science Team at Walmart Global Tech is focused on using the latest research in generative AI (GenAI), artificial intelligence (AI), machine learning (ML), statistics, deep learning, computer vision and optimization to implement solutions that ensure Walmart’s product catalog is accurate, complete, and optimized for customer experience. Our team tackles complex data science and ML engineering challenges related to product classification, attribute extraction, trust & safety, and catalog optimization, empowering next-generation retail use cases. We take pride in writing solid production code in Python, deploying and supporting model services and pipelines, and pushing the boundaries in latency, throughput, and scalability.
...
As a Senior Data Scientist (Machine Learning Engineer) on the Catalog Data Quality team, you will collaborate with other Data Scientists and ML Engineers to develop, deploy, and scale machine learning models in production to extract attributes from product information. You will play a key role in supporting the attribute extraction platform and catalog data quality solutions — adding capabilities and driving adoption of GenAI-powered solutions to increase the coverage and accuracy of the Walmart's product catalog. The Data Science and ML Engineering community at Walmart Global Tech is active in most of the Hack events, utilizing the petabytes of data at our disposal, to build some of the coolest ideas. All the work we do at Walmart Global Tech will eventually benefit our operations & our associates, helping Customers Save Money to Live Better.
...
- Design, develop, and deploy AI/ML, NLP, LLM models into production environments with a focus on reliability and scalability. Own the full model lifecycle — from experimentation and offline evaluation through serving, monitoring, and iterative improvement in production.
...
- Demonstrated history of strong hands-on experience in AI/ML modeling
...
- Hands-on experience with Generative AI technologies: LLMs, multimodal models, RAG architectures, prompt engineering, and fine-tuning (LoRA/QLoRA)
...
- Prior Experience in building GenAI, DL, Vision-based models.
...
- Strong foundation in classical ML, deep learning, and modern architectures — CNNs, Transformers, and domain-specific variants
...
Mandatory Skills: Machine Learning, NLP, Computer Vision, Deep-learning, Python, GenAI Additional Qualifications: Good to have experience in areas such as LLM Optimization.
...

results.title: Distinguished Data Scientist: Associate AI Experience at Walmart | Jeremy
highlights:
Distinguished Data Scientist: Associate AI Experience at Walmart
...
# Distinguished Data Scientist: Associate AI Experience
...
Distinguished individual contributor role leading next-generation agentic AI systems and autonomous agents at enterprise scale across Walmart's global operations, combining deep ML/AI expertise with cross-functional mentorship and high-impact productionized solutions.
...
We are seeking a Distinguished Data Scientist to provide technical leadership and long‑term vision for next‑generation AI systems and platforms. This senior individual contributor will drive breakthrough system design and advanced solution development that transforms Walmart at scale. The role combines deep technical expertise (ML, simulation, optimization, agentic AI) with cross‑functional influence, mentoring of senior talent, and delivery of high‑impact, productionized solutions. You will be a great fit if: - You architect end-to-end ML/AI systems — from feature engineering through production deployment and monitoring - You’ve built and shipped multiple autonomous AI agents (not just experimented with LLM APIs) - You’re Level 5+ on Steve Yegge’s Vibe Coding scale and can ship production systems through AI-assisted development - You combine deep statistical rigor with practical business impact
...
About the Team The Associate AI Experiences team applies advanced data science, machine learning, and agentic AI to solve high-impact business problems across Walmart globally. You’ll build production Agentic systems, deploy autonomous AI agents, and translate complex data into actionable insights that drive measurable business value at massive scale. Our team builds intelligent platforms, agents and ML-powered solutions that make associates’ jobs easier, faster, and more fulfilling across stores, fulfillment centers, distribution centers, and home office. We leverage the Element LLM Gateway to safely access state-of-the-art language models while keeping all data within Walmart’s network. Our work spans NLP, computer vision, time series forecasting, and multi-agent AI systems at enterprise scale.
...
- Build and deploy production ML systems end-to-end: data pipelines, feature stores, model training, serving layers, monitoring, and feedback loops at scale
...
- Provide technical visionand lead advanced development in agentic AI, reinforcement learning, and simulation.
...
- Architect and deploy large-scale AI systems and autonomous AI agents — conversational assistants, predictive agents with tool-calling, and multi-agent orchestration systems using LangChain, Pydantic AI, and RAG patterns
...
- Deploy NLP pipelines at enterprise scale — semantic similarity across millions of records using BERT/SBERT embeddings and vector search (FAISS)
...
- Deep expertise in ML algorithms (XGBoost, CatBoost, LightGBM, Random Forest, AutoML) and deep learning (PyTorch, transformer architectures).
...
- Production experience with NLP (BERT, SBERT, FAISS, RAG), computer vision (YOLO, CLIP), and time series forecasting (ARIMA, Prophet).
...
- Hands-on experience building and orchestrating multiple AI agents with LangChain, RAG, tool integration, and memory management.
...
- Multi-cloud ML platform proficiency — AWS SageMaker AND GCP (Vertex AI, BigQuery, BigQuery ML).
...
- Strong Python skills (Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn) with containerization (Docker) and MLOps practices.
...
- Masters degree in Statistics, Economics, Mathematics, Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field AND 8+ years’ experience in data science or Machine Learning roles with demonstrated impact.
...
- PhD in AI, Machine Learning, Computer Science, Information Technology, Statistics, Applied Mathematics, Econometrics, or related field with relevant industry experience.
